note_on_false_positives: 4 of 5 issues (missing files, missing golden vectors, missing password_reauth, missing membership_tx) were Codex reviewing workspace state instead of the plan. Those files are Phase 3 DELIVERABLES — their absence during planning is expected. Future phase prompts must clarify: 'this is a PLAN review, not a code review — the files do not exist yet and that is correct'.

issues_filtered.title: Idempotency timestamp source unspecified (client vs server clock)
issues_filtered.why: If handler accepts client timestamps, clock skew can bypass dedupe or cause false collisions; replay behavior non-deterministic across nodes.
issues_filtered.repair: Server-authoritative truncation at command entry; defensive .UTC().Truncate(Second) inside ComputeIdempotencyKey; handler rejects client-supplied timestamps; godoc pins contract.

issues_false_positive: Phase 3 source files not present in workspace (expected — plan-time review)
Golden vectors not pinned yet (deliverable of Task 3.2/3.3)
action_taken: Applied R1-1 inline. Round 2 skipped — false-positive pattern makes re-review non-productive. Phase 3 proceeds.
